The '''Geroon Remnant''' was a [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] military unit posing as the legitimacy [[Geroon (species)|Geroon]] 
[[Politics/Legends|government]] following their apparent abandonment of their [[Geroon|homeworld]] due to being polluted. In truth however, the Geroon Remnant was a part of a [[Vagaari Empire]] plot and the Geroon homeworld was already free, having been liberated by the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]].<ref name="SQ" />

==History==
It was supposedly created after the [[Geroon]] had gave out after being so polluted by the Vagaari and were forced to abandoned their homeworld,<ref name="SQ" /> by [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> they said they numbered only 60,000, and could fit into a single 300-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long transport. The Geroon Remnant was under the leadership of [[First Steward]] [[Bearsh]].<ref name="SQ" />

In reality, however, the Geroon Remnant was merely a front established by a group of Vagaari in an attempt to infiltrate the ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' so it could destroy the [[Outbound Flight Project|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="SQ" />
